permits.description:
Renovate existing kitchen- Cabinets, Appliances, Flooring, Etc..
Renovate existing kitchen and bathroom. Contract attached. Appliance locations not changing - will attach drawings. Bathroom- sink, toilet and shower locations not changing. Renovating to newer products, most kitchen cabinets are staying and changing out broken ones, and adding LVT flooring etc.
